TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kasavakan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taitung Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 604 buwan, 1,637 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 49% kyan ku 799 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 51% kyan ku 838 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Puyuma 38%, Amis 5%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 2%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kasavakan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Kasavakan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kasavakan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kasavakan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kasavakan hya' ga Pakurung. tay mkyahu' na Kasavakan hya' ga Siafulungay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kasavakan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kas~ɕa*akan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taituŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pujuma **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kas~ɕa*akan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na kas~ɕa*akan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na kas~ɕa*akan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kas~ɕa*akan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kas~ɕa*akan ħjaʔ ɣa pakuruŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kas~ɕa*akan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕia*uluŋaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kas~ɕa*akan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kasavakan ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taitung Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 604 buwan, 1,637 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 49% kyan ku 799 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 51% kyan ku 838 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Puyuma 38%, Amis 5%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 2%, Rukay 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kasavakan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Kasavakan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kasavakan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kasavakan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kasavakan hya' ga Pakurung. tay mkyahu' na Kasavakan hya' ga Siafulungay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Kasavakan ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ kas~ɕa*akan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taituŋ s~ɕi, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pujuma **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na kas~ɕa*akan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na kas~ɕa*akan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na kas~ɕa*akan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kas~ɕa*akan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na kas~ɕa*akan ħjaʔ ɣa pakuruŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na kas~ɕa*akan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕia*uluŋaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ kas~ɕa*akan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
